headline: Fortune Brands and Quanex Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the after-market session after the prospect of a US-Iran peace deal pushed the 10-year Treasury yield down and cut the probability of a Federal Reserve rate hike in October, the most direct path to mortgage relief the sector had seen in months.

summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the prospect of a US-Iran peace deal pushed the 10-year Treasury yield down and cut the probability of a Federal Reserve rate hike in October, the most direct path to mortgage relief the sector had seen in months.
